channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mamata Banerjee alleges pressure on hospitals and doctors following attack on Abhishek Banerjee in South 24 Parganas
item.description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has alleged that hospitals and medical staff faced external pressure while treating Trinamool Congress MP Abhishek Banerjee after he was attacked in South 24...

item.title: ICE Explores Using Digital Advertising Data to Track Immigrants
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) is reportedly exploring new methods to monitor and target immigrants by requesting information on how to access data from digital advertisers. This data ...

item.title: CCTV footage and witness accounts help police identify suspects in Utumishi Girls School dormitory fire investigation
item.description: Fresh details have emerged regarding the tragic fire incident at Utumishi Girls Senior School that resulted in the deaths of 16 students and left 79 others injured. Investigators report that CCTV foot...

item.title: Super Eagles Beat Jamaica 3-0 to Retain Unity Cup Trophy
item.description: Naija Super Eagles don show say dem still dey strong for Unity Cup as dem hammer Jamaica 3-0 for Valley Stadium, London. Dis win make Naija secure di 2026 Unity Cup title, same way wey dem bin win las...

item.title: Western Kenya Leaders Encourage Edwin Sifuna to Take Prominent Leadership Role Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: During the burial of Mzee Patrick Wangamati in Kabuchai, leaders from across Western Kenya turned the occasion into a major political gathering. The event saw calls for unity and fresh leadership with...

item.title: Documentary explores Australia’s post-war Nazi immigration and contemporary threats
item.description: Dan Goldberg was finalising his SBS documentary, The Hunt For Australia’s Last Nazis, which investigates Australia’s post-World War II acceptance of displaced persons, including over 4,000 former Nazi...

item.title: U.S. guidance helps increase commercial ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Shipowners are showing cautious optimism as the number of commercial vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz increases, following guidance from U.S. military forces. While the U.S. is not escorting sh...

item.title: Authorities investigate mysterious loud boom that shook homes in Boston
item.description: Residents across parts of Boston were startled on Saturday after a loud, unexplained boom shook homes and prompted a surge of emergency calls to 911. The incident, which occurred around 2pm local time...

item.title: Philippines advances defense ties with New Zealand under SOVFA and promotes regional security convergence
item.description: The Philippines is preparing to quickly implement its Status of Visiting Forces Agreement (SOVFA) with New Zealand once it is ratified, while also positioning itself as a strategic “convergence hub” f...

item.title: Lobster dealer Eric Thibault faces intimidation trial over alleged threats in Nova Scotia court
item.description: A provincial court in Digby, Nova Scotia, heard evidence in the intimidation trial of lobster dealer Eric David Thibault, 66, including a short audio recording of an alleged confrontation from Novembe...

item.title: How Arsenal Became a Beloved Football Club Across Africa
item.description: Arsenal’s influence in Africa transcends mere football fandom. Following their recent Premier League triumph, celebrations erupted across the continent, from Nairobi to Lagos, with fans taking to stre...

item.title: Judge Kathleen Williams Orders Review of Trump IRS Settlement Over Alleged Fraud
item.description: On Friday, Judge Kathleen Williams took a significant step by ordering a review of former President Donald Trump’s $10 billion case against the IRS, citing potential fraud in the settlement process. T...

item.title: Ousmane Dembele Tops 2026 Ballon d'Or Rankings After PSG Clinches Champions League
item.description: The 2026 Ballon d'Or race has taken a fresh turn after Paris Saint-Germain successfully defended their Champions League title on May 30, beating Arsenal at the Puskas Arena in Budapest. Ousmane Dembel...

item.title: Egypt announce 2026 World Cup squad led by Mohamed Salah with inclusion of teenage striker Abdel Karim
item.description: Egypt have officially named their final squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in North America, with Liverpool star Mohamed Salah leading the team as the main attacking figure. Head coach Hossam Hassan co...

item.title: Eric Fructuoso Hosts an Enjoyable Game on Kapamilya Deal or No Deal
item.description: ABS-CBN recently gave viewers an exciting glimpse into the lively and entertaining episode of 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal' hosted by Eric Fructuoso. Known for his charisma and engaging personality, Eri...

item.title: A Review of the Latest TV Shows: Drama, Comedy, and Reboots
item.description: This week, Clare Rigden revisits some popular TV shows across streaming platforms. 'Two Years Later' on Paramount Plus explores the imagined commuter romance of Emily and Ryan, testing whether eight d...

item.title: Opposition alleges procedural irregularities in Kochi biomining contract extension
item.description: The Opposition Left Democratic Front (LDF) in the Kochi Corporation has accused Mayor V.K. Minimol of abuse of power in connection with the extension of a biomining contract for legacy waste managemen...

item.title: Ride for Dad announces annual fundraising total for prostate cancer research in Winnipeg
item.description: The article reports on the annual fundraising results of Ride for Dad, a community-driven initiative dedicated to supporting prostate cancer research and awareness in Canada. Based in Winnipeg, the or...

item.title: Governor Yusuf says his administration has delivered 90% of campaign promises in Kano State
item.description: Governor Abba Kabir Yusuf of Kano State has stated that his administration has achieved about 90% completion of the promises he made to the people of the state within three years in office. He made th...

item.title: NMC proposes extending MBBS duration to ten years to finish the course
item.description: The National Medical Commission (NMC) in India has proposed a draft amendment to the Graduate Medical Education Regulations 2023, suggesting that the maximum duration to complete undergraduate medical...
